## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and **why** (problem solved, rubric/checkpoint link, or design note).

## Type of change

- [ ] Module / pipeline feature
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation or report
- [ ] Tooling / repo workflow
- [ ] Bug fix

## Testing

Describe how you verified the change (e.g. `pytest` paths, manual CLI run, Streamlit smoke test).

## Review checklist

- [ ] Inputs/outputs match the module spec in `README.md` / `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] New or updated tests cover behavior (not only implementation details)
- [ ] No unrelated refactors mixed into the same PR

## Notes for reviewers

Optional: screenshots, open questions, or follow-ups.
